allow: Bash(node -e "const R=require\('react'\); console.log\('keys with View:', Object.keys\(R\).filter\(k=>/view/i.test\(k\)\)\); console.log\('all keys count:', Object.keys\(R\).length\); console.log\('version:', R.version\);")
Bash(node -e "const R=require\('react'\); const all=Object.keys\(R\); console.log\('all React exports:'\); console.log\(all.join\('\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "try { const R=require\('react/experimental'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(R\).filter\(k=>/view/i.test\(k\)\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('no react/experimental:', e.message\); }; try { const D=require\('react-dom'\); console.log\('react-dom keys w/ View:', Object.keys\(D\).filter\(k=>/view/i.test\(k\)\)\); } catch\(e\) {}")
